metadata.dispatch_line: Possible stalking in progress, 2456 Bamboo Street, Aurora, CO, caller reports suspicious person lurking around residence

scenario.dispatch_line: Possible stalking in progress, 2456 Bamboo Street, Aurora, CO, caller reports suspicious person lurking around residence

facts.stalking_01: Time of incident: 02:45 AM, Time of dispatch: 02:50 AM, Time of arrival: 03:05 AM
facts.stalking_02: Parties identified as intimate partners, boyfriend and girlfriend, with a 2-year relationship
facts.stalking_03: History of relationship: frequent verbal arguments, 3 incidents of physical violence in the past 6 months, with escalating threats and intimidation
facts.stalking_04: Stalking behaviors: following, repeated unwanted phone calls, sending unwanted gifts and messages on social media
facts.stalking_05: Valid protection order in place, verified through county records, issued 2 months ago
facts.stalking_06: All witnesses interviewed: 2 neighbors, 1 family member, and documented in the report
facts.stalking_07: Previous incidents documented: 5 prior incidents of stalking, 2 prior incidents of physical violence
facts.stalking_08: Evidence collected: torn clothing, broken phone, and a threatening letter
facts.stalking_09: Electronic/technological evidence collected: phone records, social media messages, and GPS tracking data
facts.stalking_10: All incidents of stalking behavior on cell phones, computers, and recording devices captured: 10 incidents of unwanted calls, 20 incidents of unwanted messages
facts.stalking_11: Scene described: a single-family residence at 2456 Bamboo Street, Aurora, CO
facts.stalking_12: Weapons/objects used: a kitchen knife, a baseball bat, and a broken vase
facts.stalking_13: Emotional state of the victim: fearful, anxious, and feeling trapped
facts.stalking_14: Evidence of fear articulated: shaking, crying, and expressing fear for her life
facts.stalking_15: All threats clearly documented: 5 verbal threats, 2 written threats, and 1 implied threat
facts.stalking_16: Use of coercion and/or force articulated: physical restraint, verbal intimidation, and emotional manipulation
facts.stalking_17: All injuries properly documented: a broken arm, a black eye, and a cut on the forehead
facts.stalking_18: Property damage, theft, or burglary documented: a broken window, a stolen phone, and a damaged door
facts.stalking_19: Photos taken and details recorded: 10 photos of injuries, 5 photos of property damage
facts.stalking_20: Victim's report of being strangled: described as being choked with both hands, unable to breathe
facts.stalking_21: Victim's need for medical attention documented: transported to the hospital for treatment of injuries
facts.stalking_22: All spontaneous statements captured: 'I'm going to kill you', 'You'll never leave me'
facts.stalking_23: Elements of the stalking crime thoroughly articulated: repeated behavior, intent to harm, and fear of harm
facts.stalking_24: Victim's safety planning documented: a plan to stay with a friend, to change phone numbers, and to vary daily routines
facts.stalking_25: Information about obtaining an order of protection provided to the victim: explained the process, provided a brochure
facts.stalking_26: Information about local service providers supplied to the victim: a list of 5 local shelters, 3 counseling services
facts.stalking_27: Threat/risk assessment tool utilized with the victim: a standardized assessment tool, with a score indicating high risk
facts.stalking_28: Use of a stalking kit and/or stalking log discussed with the victim: provided a stalking log, explained how to use it
facts.stalking_29: Suspect's access to weapons documented: owns a handgun, has access to a rifle, but prohibited from possessing due to a qualifying order of protection and a conviction for a misdemeanor crime of domestic violence
facts.stalking_30: Emotional state of the suspect: angry, aggressive, and uncooperative
facts.stalking_31: Suspect's history of protection orders: 2 prior protection orders, both for domestic violence
facts.stalking_32: Suspect's prohibition from possessing firearms: due to a conviction for a misdemeanor crime of domestic violence, and a qualifying order of protection
facts.stalking_33: Active warrants out for the suspect documented: 1 active warrant for domestic violence, 1 active warrant for stalking

interview_transcript.content: So what did you see exactly?

*I take a deep breath, trying to calm my nerves* I... I saw him standing outside my window at 2:45 AM. He was just standing there, staring at me. I was already scared because he's been following me and calling me nonstop, even though I have a protection order against him. *I pause, trying to hold back tears* He's been doing this for a while now, and it's getting worse. He's sent me gifts and messages on social media, and he's even shown up at my work. *I shake my head, feeling a mix of fear and anxiety* But this time, it was different. This time, he was right outside my house. *I look down, my voice barely above a whisper* And then he started yelling at me, saying he was going to kill me if I didn't take him back. *I take another deep breath, trying to compose myself* I was so scared, I didn't know what to do. That's when I called the police.
Do you know who it is?

*I nod, feeling a surge of fear and anxiety* Yes, I know who it is. It's my ex-boyfriend. We were together for about 2 years, but it was a really toxic relationship. There were a lot of verbal arguments, and... *I pause, hesitant to share more* ...and there were some incidents of physical violence. He's been stalking me since we broke up, and it's just gotten worse and worse. *I look up, my eyes welling up with tears* I'm so scared of him. I just want him to leave me alone. *I take a deep breath, trying to calm down* I have a protection order against him, but it doesn't seem to be stopping him. *I shake my head, feeling a sense of desperation* I don't know what to do.

*I nod, wincing in pain as I remember the incidents* Yes, he's hurt me before. There have been a few times when he's gotten physical with me. He's pushed me, slapped me, and even choked me once. *I touch my neck, feeling a surge of fear at the memory* It was really scary. And it's not just the physical stuff - he's also really good at manipulating me and making me feel guilty or scared. *I look down, feeling a mix of shame and fear* I've tried to leave him before, but he always finds a way to pull me back in. *I take a deep breath, trying to composed myself* But this time, I'm really scared. He's been getting more and more aggressive, and I'm afraid of what he might do next. *I look up, my eyes welling up with tears* That's why I called the police. I just want to be safe.
